properties.query: INSERT INTO section (village_id, user_id, chap_no, section_name, content, video_url, status) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'ACTIVE')
SELECT section_id, village_id, user_id, chap_no, section_name, content, video_url, status FROM section WHERE village_id = ? AND section_id = ? AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT section_id, village_id, user_id, chap_no, section_name, content, video_url, status FROM section WHERE village_id = ? AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY chap_no ASC
SELECT section_id, village_id, user_id, chap_no, section_name, content, video_url, status FROM section WHERE section_id = ? AND status = 'ACTIVE'
